abort.cannot_identify: Unable to determine a unique ID for this device. Please check your device and network configuration.

zeroconf_confirm.description: You are setting up the Tewke device **{name}**{room_suffix}. Click Submit to continue.
zeroconf_confirm.title: Tewke device found

confirm_control_types.description:
Choose the Home Assistant platform type for each scene.

**Light** (default) — the scene appears as a dimmable light entity.
**Switch** — use this if you want to remove brightness control entirely.
**Fan** — use this if you want brightness or speed control, but do not want the scene to appear as a light entity.
confirm_control_types.title: Configure scene types

fan_default_speeds.description: Set the default scene value (1–100) to be applied when each scene is turned on without a specific value.
fan_default_speeds.title: Default scene dimming

placeholder.description: Your Tewke device **{name}** is ready to be added to Home Assistant. Click Submit to complete the setup.
placeholder.title: Final setup

abort.no_fan_scenes: No fan scenes are configured for this device.

init.description: Set the default scene value (1–100) to be applied when each scene is turned on without a specific value.
init.title: Default scene dimming

new_scenes_found.title: New Scenes discovered
new_scenes_found.description:
New Scenes have been discovered on your Tewke device {name}.

Please configure them to make them available in Home Assistant.

init.title: Configure new Tewke scenes
init.description: New scenes were found on your Tewke device {name}. Please assign a Home Assistant platform type for each new scene.

abort.no_new_scenes: There are no new scenes pending configuration for your Tewke device {name}.
